title: Kerala Assembly Polls 2026 | Sudhakaran hints at ‘revolt’ as Congress decides to keep MPs off Assembly polls
description: Sudhakaran’s ‘hasty return’ from Delhi to Kannur, when Parliament is in session, seems to have rocked the Congress’s bid to present a united face at the hustings. He asserted last week that he would ‘100 per cent” contest the polls from Kannur
